subcodes.first_line: O thou bird that, on the wings of certitude, doth soar unto the horizon of divine knowledge! Blessed art thou, for thou hast quaffed of the choice wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الطائر بجناح الایقان الی افق العرفان هنیا لک بما شربت الرحیق من
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
